body: This call fetches the full dataset regardless of the date range selected in the dashboard (AC 5). `DateRangeFilter` is available in `DashboardState` but is never passed here. Should `export()` accept a filter parameter, or read from the state provider directly?

The web export path skips the loading state. `isExporting` is never set to `true` here, so the button stays enabled and the UI gives no feedback during serialisation. Mobile sets loading state at line 44 — should the web path share the same wrapper?
